parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO eurostat_regional_gdp (geo_code, geo_name, year, gdp_value, unit)
VALUES ('{{ $json.geo_code }}', '{{ $json.geo_name }}', {{ $json.year }}, {{ $json.gdp_value }}, '{{ $json.unit }}')
ON CONFLICT (geo_code, year, unit)
DO UPDATE SET gdp_value = EXCLUDED.gdp_value, geo_name = EXCLUDED.geo_name;

=INSERT INTO eurostat_regional_crime_rates (geo_code, geo_name, year, offence_category, crime_count, unit)
VALUES ('{{ $json.geo_code }}', '{{ $json.geo_name }}', {{ $json.year }}, '{{ $json.offence_category.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.crime_count }}, '{{ $json.unit }}')
ON CONFLICT (geo_code, year, offence_category, unit)
DO UPDATE SET crime_count = EXCLUDED.crime_count, geo_name = EXCLUDED.geo_name;
